title: Diátaxis documentation concept (MIF Level 1)
description: The frontmatter-plus-body projection of a Diátaxis quadrant document: a MIF v1.0 base concept (schemas/mif/mif.schema.json — @context, @type, @id, conceptType, content, created) plus the diataxis_type quadrant marker. This is MIF Level 1 — the document carries stable, typed MIF identity but NOT the Level-3 additions (provenance, citations, entities, and the harness falsification verdict) that schemas/findings.schema.json requires; the canonical L3 source of truth remains the report channel. The base $ref points at the REAL vendored MIF schema; this file only adds, never overrides (no additionalProperties:false, so the concept's own @-prefixed keys are preserved).

diataxis_type.description: The Diátaxis quadrant this document serves (SPEC §6d channel pack).
